summary: Vertical video. Vice President JD Vance delivers a podium speech to an audience, recounting the State of the Union and referring to congressional Democrats not standing for a girl wounded by an 'illegal alien criminal.' All frames are the same static podium shot, with the presidential seal, hardhats, and 'MADE IN AMERICA' signs behind him, and burned-in caption subtitles. The clip has a long talking transcript and no music.
notable_text: Burned-in caption subtitles of the speech; podium reads 'PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES'; audience signs 'MADE IN AMERICA'. Quote: "We stand and we ought to fight for you, not illegal alien criminals."
